---
name: Architecture Discussion
about: Open a structured discussion about the engine's architecture
title: "[Architecture] "
labels: architecture
assignees: ''
---

> This template is for deliberate architectural discussions — questions about module boundaries, data flow, invariants, or structural decisions. For bugs or feature requests, please use the appropriate template.
>
> Arguments must be technical and grounded in the project's principles. See [ARCHITECTURE.md](../../ARCHITECTURE.md) and [MANIFESTO.md](../../MANIFESTO.md).

---

## Current situation

<!-- Describe the aspect of the architecture you want to discuss. What exists today? -->

## Architectural question

<!-- State the question clearly. What is unresolved, ambiguous, or worth examining? -->

## Constraints

<!--
What constraints does any answer need to respect?
Consider: module independence, determinism, backward compatibility, testability.
-->

## Alternatives

<!--
What are the possible answers or approaches?
List each one briefly, even if you favour one over the others.
-->

## Trade-offs

<!--
What does each alternative gain and lose?
Architectural decisions always involve trade-offs — make them explicit.
-->

## Recommendation

<!--
If you have a preferred direction, state it here and explain your reasoning.
If you are genuinely uncertain, say so — the goal of this template is discussion, not advocacy.
-->
